prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! Stop letting this task intimidate you. It's been hanging over your head long enough! 

You are capable, you are strong, and you are going to tackle this thing. Just break it down into smaller, manageable pieces.

Forget about perfection, just focus on getting started. Five minutes. Just five minutes. That's all it takes to break the inertia.

You got this! Now go get it done and enjoy the feeling of accomplishment that comes after! No more excuses, just action! Go! Go! Go!
